metadata.name: Generate Customer Invoices from Shipping Data

description: The company ships products and needs to generate daily invoices for all goods shipped the previous day.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve all shipping records from the previous day from the warehouse management system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets a list of all shipments, including customer, products, and quantities.

nodes.task_description: For each shipment, create a customer invoice, pulling pricing from the customer's master record.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully generates invoices for all shipments.

nodes.task_description: Email the generated invoices to the respective customers.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sends out all the invoices.
